faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services in one place

items.question: Do you provide a guarantee on pest control services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide a real 6-month guarantee on all pest and rodent control services. If any pests reappear during the guarantee period, we re-spray for free.

items.question: Which areas do you cover in Kuwait?
items.answer: We cover all areas and governorates of Kuwait (Capital, Hawally, Farwaniya, Ahmadi, Mubarak Al-Kabeer, Jahra) and reach you as quickly as possible.

items.question: Are the materials used in cleaning and control safe?
items.answer: Absolutely, we use cleaning materials and pesticides approved by the Kuwaiti Ministry of Health, which are completely safe for children and pets and environmentally friendly.

items.question: How can I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can easily book through our website using the smart booking system, or contact us directly via WhatsApp or phone call.

Cleaning and sterilization of bathrooms and removal of construction/paint traces.

features: Cleaning of offices, reception areas, and bathrooms.
Dust removal from surfaces, equipment, and libraries.
8 visits per month (approx. twice weekly) with flexible scheduling.
